mapper.select: SELECT * FROM user_notification_state WHERE notification_id = #{notificationId} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_notification_state (notification_id, user_id, read_status, ack_status, ack_time) VALUES (#{notificationId}, #{userId}, #{readStatus}, #{ackStatus}, #{ackTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE user_notification_state SET read_status = #{readStatus} WHERE notification_id = #{notificationId} AND user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE user_notification_state SET ack_status = #{ackStatus}, ack_time = #{ackTime} WHERE notification_id = #{notificationId} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM notification_record n LEFT JOIN user_notification_state s ON n.id = s.notification_id AND s.user_id = #{userId} WHERE n.expire_time > #{now} AND (n.broadcast = 1 OR s.user_id = #{userId}) AND COALESCE(s.read_status, 0) = 0
mapper.update: INSERT INTO user_notification_state (notification_id, user_id, read_status) SELECT n.id, #{userId}, 1 FROM notification_record n WHERE n.expire_time > 0 AND n.broadcast = 1 AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM user_notification_state s WHERE s.notification_id = n.id AND s.user_id = #{userId} )
UPDATE user_notification_state SET read_status = 1 WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND read_status = 0
UPDATE notification_record SET expire_time = 0 WHERE id IN ( SELECT notification_id FROM user_notification_state WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND read_status = 1 ) AND expire_time > 0
